mapper.insert: INSERT INTO purchase_items (purchase_id, ingredient_id, qty, unit_cost, subtotal) VALUES (#{purchase_id}, #{ingredient_id}, #{qty}, #{unit_cost}, #{subtotal})
mapper.select: SELECT pi.id, pi.purchase_id, pi.ingredient_id, i.name AS ingredient_name, i.unit AS ingredient_unit, pi.qty, pi.unit_cost, pi.subtotal, pi.note FROM purchase_items pi JOIN ingredients i ON pi.ingredient_id = i.id WHERE pi.purchase_id = #{purchaseId} ORDER BY pi.id
SELECT DISTINCT pi.ingredient_id FROM purchase_items pi JOIN purchases p ON pi.purchase_id = p.id WHERE p.status = 'ordered'

SELECT pi.id, pi.purchase_id, pi.ingredient_id, i.name AS ingredient_name, i.unit AS ingredient_unit, pi.qty, pi.unit_cost, pi.subtotal, pi.note FROM purchase_items pi LEFT JOIN ingredients i ON pi.ingredient_id = i.id ORDER BY pi.purchase_id DESC, pi.id ASC
